data.body: Root cause: _cmd_list (reads_cli.py) validated --sort/--priority/--min-children but NOT --status; an unknown value fell through apply_ticket_filters' set-membership match -> [] with exit 0. FIX (committed bbddfc0c5): added _VALID_LIST_STATUSES + a validation block returning exit 2 naming the bad value + valid set; documented the vocabulary in list --help (goldens synced). RED->GREEN: tests/unit/test_list_status_validation.py (5 invalid cases exit-0 RED -> exit-2 GREEN; 7 valid cases pass). Pending: land via Gerrit + close.
